message:
refactor(storage): migrate test-fixture rusqlite → frankensqlite (3e3qg.1)

Continues the RULE 2 migration started in c7cbf431. Converts 14 of the 20
remaining rusqlite call sites in src/storage/sqlite.rs test modules to
frankensqlite equivalents, bringing the count from 20 → 6.

Migrated patterns:
- `rusqlite::Connection::open(path)` → `FrankenConnection::open(path.to_string_lossy().into_owned())`
- `conn.query_row(sql, [], |row| row.get(0))` → `conn.query_row_map(sql, fparams![], |row| row.get_typed(0))`
- `conn.execute(sql, rusqlite::params![x])` → `conn.execute_compat(sql, fparams![x])`
- `conn.execute_batch(sql)` works identically on FrankenConnection.
- `rusqlite::Connection::open_with_flags("file:...?mode=ro&immutable=1", SQLITE_OPEN_READ_ONLY | SQLITE_OPEN_URI)`
  → `open_franken_with_flags(&path.to_string_lossy(), FrankenOpenFlags::SQLITE_OPEN_READ_ONLY)`
  (dropping the URI ceremony; frankensqlite honors the readonly flag directly.)

Call sites migrated (test-only):
- `salvage_historical_databases_replays_last_completed_progress` (line 14740)
- `failed_baseline_seed_preserves_existing_canonical_bundle` (15607)
- `discover_historical_database_bundles_prefers_queryable_direct_bundles_first` (16619)
- `ensure_fts_consistency_via_rusqlite_catches_up_missing_rows` (16868, 16889)
- `franken_transition_with_fts_virtual_table_succeeds` (18253)
- `franken_storage_open_legacy_v13_with_fts_virtual_table_succeeds` (18287)
- Three readonly-verification sites (15445, 15494, 15643) switched to
  frankensqlite's native readonly open.

REMAINING (6 sites, all legitimately rusqlite-bound):
- 15376, 15414, 16760, 16911, 16970, 18401: every one uses
  `PRAGMA writable_schema = ON; INSERT INTO sqlite_master` to inject
  duplicate/malformed FTS schema rows so the repair code has something to
  exercise. AGENTS.md explicitly documents that frankensqlite does not
  support writable_schema writes; rewriting these fixtures requires either
  a frankensqlite feature add (see bead 3e3qg.1 comment) or refactoring to
  file-level byte patching. Kept as-is, clearly bounded to the corruption-
  injection test paths.

cargo check --all-targets: green.
cargo test --lib storage::sqlite::tests: 146 passing / 3 failing. The same
3 tests fail on c7cbf431 (baseline) — they are pre-existing from the
Phase 1 delegation semantics change and are being tracked separately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
